title: carthamus tamamschjanae
intro: Carthamus tamamschjanae, also known as False Safflower, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties, which are used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Carthamus tamamschjanae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
